---
name: ✒️ Submit a persona template
about: Contribute a persona YAML that captures a useful voice for the community
title: "[persona] "
labels: "persona, good first issue"
---

## Who is this persona for?

<!-- One line. e.g. "Indie game developers in small subreddits" -->

## Handle / filename

<!-- e.g. indie-game-dev.yml -->

## The YAML

```yaml
# Paste your persona here (copy from config/personas/_template.yml).
# Real example comments you've actually written matter most.
name: ""
bio: >
  ...
interests: []
expertise: []
tone:
  style: ""
  humor: ""
  formality: ""
dos: []
donts: []
example_comments:
  - >
    ...
```

## How did you test it?

<!-- Ran a scan → clicked Draft on N signals → voice matched what I'd actually say? -->

## Willing to open a PR for `config/personas/<your-handle>.yml`?

- [ ] Yes, I'll submit the PR
- [ ] Prefer a maintainer imports it from this issue
